title: phreatia loriae
intro: Phreatia loriae, also known as the 'Slipper Orchid', is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Phreatia genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are rich in saponins and flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Phreatia loriae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Phreatia loriae often involve drying and grinding the roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
